slash.name: Slash
slash.description: Deals moderate physical damage. Scales with Attack and is reduced by target's Defense.

shield_up.name: Shield Up
shield_up.description: Raises the user's Defense by 5 for two turns. Usable every other turn.

battle_cry.name: Battle Cry
battle_cry.description: Raises the user's Attack by 5 for two turns. Usable every other turn.

second_wind.name: Second Wind
second_wind.description: Heals the user for 40 base HP. Scales with Magic. Usable every third turn.

shadow_bolt.name: Shadow Bolt
shadow_bolt.description: Deals heavy magic damage. Deals 1.5x damage if the target is cursed.

drain_life.name: Drain Life
drain_life.description: Deals light magic damage and heals the user for the same amount. Scales with Magic.

curse.name: Curse
curse.description: Lowers the target's Attack by 5 for two turns and sets up Shadow Bolt.

dark_pact.name: Dark Pact
dark_pact.description: Raises the user's Magic by 5 for two turns at the cost of 15 HP.

bite.name: Bite
bite.description: Deals physical damage and poisons the target for 4 damage per turn for 2 turns.

web_throw.name: Web Throw
web_throw.description: Deals light physical damage and lowers the target's Defense by 5 for two turns.

pounce.name: Pounce
pounce.description: Deals heavy physical damage. Deals 1.5x damage if the target is webbed.

skitter.name: Skitter
skitter.description: Raises the user's Defense by 5 for two turns.

flame_breath.name: Flame Breath
flame_breath.description: Deals heavy magic damage and burns the target for 14 damage per turn for 3 turns.

claw_swipe.name: Claw Swipe
claw_swipe.description: Deals moderate physical damage. Deals 1.5x damage if the target is intimidated.

intimidate.name: Intimidate
intimidate.description: Lowers the target's Attack by 5 for two turns and sets up Claw Swipe.

dragon_scales.name: Dragon Scales
dragon_scales.description: Raises the user's Defense by 5 for two turns.

inferno.name: Inferno
inferno.description: Enrage-only dragon spell. Deals massive damage and burns the target.

rusty_blade.name: Rusty Blade
rusty_blade.description: Deals moderate physical damage. Scales with Attack and is reduced by Defense.

dirty_kick.name: Dirty Kick
dirty_kick.description: Deals light physical damage and lowers the target's Defense by 5 for two turns.

frenzy.name: Frenzy
frenzy.description: Raises the user's Attack by 5 for two turns.

headbutt.name: Headbutt
headbutt.description: Deals heavy physical damage. Deals 1.5x damage after Frenzy.

firebolt.name: Firebolt
firebolt.description: Deals moderate magic damage and burns the target for 8 damage per turn for 3 turns.

arcane_surge.name: Arcane Surge
arcane_surge.description: Raises the user's Magic by 5 for two turns.

mana_drain.name: Mana Drain
mana_drain.description: Deals light magic damage and lowers the target's Magic by 5 for two turns.

hex_shield.name: Hex Shield
hex_shield.description: Raises the user's Defense by 5 for two turns.
